creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello, this PR seems quite old and in need of closing. 
Does anyone who worked on this PR happen to know whether 
this was fixed in either the current version of ssh or socks5? 

Due to the age of the PR, I'm instituting a one-month 
timeout period in which I will close this PR if I do 
not receive any replies to this message. Thanks.
